## Result
- **Brick**: depgraph
- **Mode**: native
- **Mini-task**: List all non-test files in `packages/core` that directly import `injector/container.ts` (fan-in analysis)
- **Answer**:
```
packages/core/exceptions/base-exception-filter-context.ts
packages/core/exceptions/external-exception-filter-context.ts
packages/core/guards/guards-context-creator.ts
packages/core/helpers/external-context-creator.ts
packages/core/injector/instance-links-host.ts
packages/core/injector/instance-loader.ts
packages/core/injector/internal-core-module/internal-core-module-factory.ts
packages/core/injector/module-ref.ts
packages/core/injector/module.ts
packages/core/inspector/graph-inspector.ts
packages/core/interceptors/interceptors-context-creator.ts
packages/core/middleware/container.ts
packages/core/middleware/middleware-module.ts
packages/core/middleware/routes-mapper.ts
packages/core/nest-application-context.ts
packages/core/nest-application.ts
packages/core/nest-factory.ts
packages/core/pipes/pipes-context-creator.ts
packages/core/router/router-exception-filters.ts
packages/core/router/router-explorer.ts
packages/core/router/routes-resolver.ts
packages/core/scanner.ts
```
- **Turns used**: 8
- **Tools used**: Bash, Read
- **Rough token estimate**: ~10,000
- **Notes**: `packages/core/injector/index.ts` re-exports (`export * from './container'`) but contains no `import` statements pointing to `container.ts`, so it is excluded. `packages/core/repl/repl-context.ts` imports `NestContainer` via the barrel `../injector` (not directly from `../injector/container`), so it is also excluded from the direct-import fan-in count.
mini_task_spec: Using the **depgraph** brick's `fanin` tool, find all non-test TypeScript (`.ts`) source files within `test-repo/packages/core/` that directly import from `test-repo/packages/core/injector/container.ts`. "Directly import" means any `import ... from '...'` statement that resolves to that file (e.g. `from './container'`, `from '../container'`, `from '../injector/container'`, `from './injector/container'`). Exclude any file whose path contains `/test/`, and exclude `index.ts` re-export-only files (i.e., files that only have `export * from '...'` without any `import` statement referencing container). Return paths relative to `test-repo/`, sorted alphabetically, one per line.
